settings.content: This text appears in the announcement bar, on every product page, and powers the cart progress bar. One promise, everywhere. No more conflicting offers.

settings.label: Shipping promise
settings.default: Free US shipping on orders over $50

settings.label: Guarantee 3
settings.default: Engraved to order in the USA

settings.content: These power the gift-packaging add-on on product pages, the upsells in the cart drawer and cart page, and the order-by date for the next gifting occasion.

settings.label: Gift packaging product
settings.info: Pick your Premium Gift Packaging product. It becomes a one-tap add-on on every product page and in the cart.

settings.label: Cart upsell collection
settings.info: Products suggested in the cart drawer (items already in the cart are skipped). Best sellers work well.

settings.label: Next gifting occasion
settings.info: e.g. Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day. Leave blank to hide the order-by reminder.

settings.label: Occasion date (YYYY-MM-DD)
settings.info: The reminder computes the last safe order date from your lead + transit times and hides itself once it has passed.

settings.label: Note under card prices
settings.info: Shown on every product card. Hidden on products tagged 'no-personalization'. Leave blank to disable.
